ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_batch_notes_batch` 
FOREIGN KEY (`batch_id`) REFERENCES `payroll_batches`(`id`) 
ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;

FOREIGN KEY (`reviewer_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;

FOREIGN KEY (`worker_id`) REFERENCES `workers`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;

ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;

ALTER TABLE `payroll_batch_corrections` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_batch_corrections_corrector` 
FOREIGN KEY (`corrector_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;
